_bot?.sendMessage(chatId, `🚫 Outbound Call Failed\n📞 ${formatPhone(num.phoneNumber)} → ${formatPhone(destination)}\nReason: Call routing failed. Please try again.`, { parse_mode: 'HTML' }).catch(() => {})

_bot.sendMessage(process.env.TELEGRAM_ADMIN_CHAT_ID, `⚠️ Orphaned Number Alert 📞 ${to} received inbound call from ${from} ❌ No owner found in DB — call rejected. This number may need to be released or re-assigned.`, { parse_mode: 'HTML' }).catch(() => {})

_bot?.sendMessage(chatId, `💰 Overage Active — Plan minutes exhausted. ${chargedStr} (${isUSCanada(destination) ? 'US/CA' : 'Intl'}) from ${deductResult.currency.toUpperCase()} wallet.`, { parse_mode: 'HTML' }).catch(() => {})
_bot?.sendMessage(chatId, `🚫 Call Ended — Plan minutes + wallet exhausted.\n⏱️ ~${elapsedMin} min. Top up wallet or upgrade plan.`, { parse_mode: 'HTML' }).catch(() => {})

'US/CA' : 'Intl'}).\nBalance: $${walletCheck.usdBal.toFixed(2)} / NGN: ₦${0}\nOutbound calls are billed from wallet. Top up via 👛 Wallet.`, { parse_mode: 'HTML' }).catch(() => {})
_bot?.sendMessage(chatId, `🚫 Call Disconnected — Wallet exhausted.\nTop up via 👛 Wallet.`, { parse_mode: 'HTML' }).catch(() => {})

_bot?.sendMessage(chatId, `⚠️ Low Balance — $${usdBal.toFixed(2)} (~${estMinutes} min IVR fwd). Top up via 👛 Wallet.`, { parse_mode: 'HTML' }).catch(() => {})
notifyUser(chatId, num, 'ivr_forward', session, { digit: digits, forwardTo: option.forwardTo })
notifyUser(chatId, num, 'ivr_message', session, { digit: digits, message: option.message })
async function notifyUser(chatId, num, type, session, extra = {}) {
_bot?.sendMessage(session.chatId, `🚫 IVR Call Ended — Wallet exhausted ($${usdBal.toFixed(2)}).\nIVR calls cost $${IVR_CALL_RATE}/min. Top up via 👛 Wallet.`, { parse_mode: 'HTML' }).catch(() => {})

_bot?.sendMessage(session.chatId, `📞 Call not connected — the recipient was busy or didn't answer.\n\n🎁 Your free trial call is still available! Try again anytime.`, { parse_mode: 'HTML' }).catch(() => {})
